title: CUTE STONE BBQ Grill Toys for Kids with Color Changing Food, Cool Mist Spray, Sizzling Sound & Lights - Pretend Play Cooking Outdoor Grill Set with Frying Pan, on Wheels for Easy Move
features: Magical Color-Changing BBQ Grill Playset: Watch food magically change color! Add ice water to the fryer to see the fries & nuggets change color, and use the included toy grill torch on the meat slices and chicken wings reveal a brilliant color change, simulating a realistic and captivating grilling process that amazes every child.

Realistic Mist Spray, Sizzling Sound & Light Effects: Simply add water to activate the cool mist spray, creating a realistic smoke effect from the simulated charcoal. Combined with authentic sizzling sounds and glowing light effects, this grill toy delivers a thrilling and immersive outdoor BBQ experience for kids—with zero real heat or flames for absolute safety.

3-in-1 Multi-Function Cooking Station: Explore endless culinary creativity! Our BBQ playset features a sizzling fryer station, a magical grill with light gun, and a realistic frying pan. Kids can cook steaks, fry french fries, and grill skewers just like a real chef, boosting imagination and role-play opportunities for hours on end.

Super Complete BBQ Accessories Set: Comes with everything needed for a BBQ party: color-changing fries & nuggets, light-reactive meat slices, chicken wings & sausage and more play food, cooking utensils, seasoning bottles, a handy storage basket, and a grill tray. It inspires organized and imaginative pretend play right away.

Safe, Mobile & Educational Role-Play Toy: Crafted from child-safe materials, this 2-Tier kitchen toy on smooth-rolling casters is easy to move anywhere. It encourages creative role-play, develops fine motor skills, and promotes social interaction during collaborative cooking fun, making it a perfect gift.
